login.title: Quiniela 2026
login.subtitle: Enter your email to sign in or request an invite.
login.linkExpiredTitle: Magic link expired or already used
login.linkExpiredBody: Email security scanners sometimes consume links before you click them. Enter your email below to get a fresh one.
login.step1: Enter your email — invited users get a magic link instantly
login.step2: New? Your request goes to the admin — invite + $10 entry required
login.deadline: Pre-tournament deadline: {date} — four days before kickoff
login.sentLinkBody: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click it to enter the tournament.
login.checkSpam: 📁 Check your spam folder if you don't see it
login.openInBrowser: 📱 Tap the link from your email app — make sure it opens in your main browser (not Gmail's in-app viewer)
login.requestSentBody: {email} isn't on the guest list yet. The admin is reviewing your request.
login.payNowSub: Your invite will be sent once payment is confirmed. Choose your method below.
login.qrHint: Scan with your Bolivian banking app (Tigo Money, Banco Unión, etc.)
login.ethWarningBody: sending USDC on any other network (Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, etc.) will result in permanently lost funds.
login.usdcHint: Send exactly $10 USDC. Include your email in a memo if your wallet supports it.
login.sendError: Could not send request. Try again.

rules.title: Rules & Scoring
rules.subtitle: Everything you need to know to play Quiniela 2026.
rules.matchPredSubtitle: Predict the exact score of every match. Points are multiplied by the stage.
rules.exactScorePts: 5 pts × multiplier (correct result included — not additive)
rules.correctResultPts: 2 pts × multiplier (score was wrong, but W/D/L was right)
rules.upsetBonusPts: +3 pts (flat, on top of any correct result)
rules.missingDefault: • Miss the lock time and your prediction isn't counted — no points available for that match.
rules.preTournamentSubtitle: Submit before June 7. Cannot be changed after the lock.
rules.funBetsRulesSub: No points — just for fun and bragging rights. Settle the argument at the final whistle.
rules.ruleFunBet1: First goal scorer of the tournament
rules.ruleFunBet2: First player shown a red card
rules.ruleFunBet3: Total red cards in the tournament
rules.ruleFunBet4: Will the Final go to extra time & penalties?
rules.ruleFunBet6: Team that scores the most goals overall
rules.groupStandingsSubtitle: Predict final standings for all 12 groups. Max 11 pts per group × 12 groups = 132 pts.
rules.thirdPlaceSubtitle: Pick 8 of the 12 group 3rd-place teams you think will advance. 3 pts per correct pick. Max 24 pts.
rules.thirdPlaceSmartNote: Smart ranking: enter your group-stage scores in Predictions → Group Stage and the qualifier picker will show each 3rd-place team's stats and rank. Use Auto-select top 8 to apply the ranking instantly.
rules.communityBetsSub: Vote on fun bet ideas for each tournament phase. The most-voted suggestions get reviewed by the admin before each stage begins.
rules.communityBetsHow1: Submit a bet idea and choose a difficulty (Easy · 1pt / Medium · 2pt / Hard · 3pt / Expert · 5pt)
rules.communityBetsHow2: Upvote your favorites — top 3 by votes are emailed to the admin before the phase deadline
rules.communityBetsHow3: Admin reviews and marks selected bets; results settled at the end of each phase
rules.communityBetsActiveSub: These 3 bets were voted in by the group. Lock 15 minutes before the first match on June 11. Submit your picks at Community Bets.
rules.communityBetsActiveBet1: Balón de Oro (best player of the tournament)
rules.communityBetsNote: Selected community bets earn real points. Answers are settled by the admin at the end of each phase.
rules.championRebuyBody: If your predicted champion gets eliminated, the admin will unlock a one-time rebuy. Pick a new champion for a reduced points reward. You get one rebuy — use it wisely.
rules.predictionToolsSub: Built-in helpers to keep your picks consistent.
rules.toolSync: Standings sync — if your manually-picked group standings differ from what your match scores produce, an amber badge appears. Click Sync all & save to align them in one shot.
rules.toolWarnings: Trophy pick warnings — if your champion or runner-up can't reach that stage based on your group standings, a warning appears. Your picks are saved regardless; it's a heads-up, not a block.
rules.toolQualifiers: Pick any team you think could advance from 3rd place. If your pick doesn't match the 3rd-place team in your group standings, a ⚠ badge will appear as a reminder.
rules.faq1q: What if I miss a match prediction?
rules.faq1a: If you miss the lock time, your prediction isn't counted and you get no points for that match. There's no default score — you have to submit a pick to be eligible for points.
rules.faq2q: Can I change my predictions after saving?
rules.faq2a: Yes, until the lock time for that match. Group stage locks 15 minutes before kickoff.
rules.faq3a: After each match, the admin enters the result and triggers a recompute. The leaderboard updates live.
rules.faq4q: How is the upset bonus awarded?
rules.faq4a: When the admin marks a match as an upset AND you correctly predicted the result, you get +3 pts flat.
rules.faq5q: What does the standings sync do?
rules.faq5a: It compares your match score predictions with your manually-picked group standings. If they disagree, an amber warning shows on the Group Standings tab. Sync all & save fixes all 12 groups at once.
rules.faq6q: Do community bet points count toward my leaderboard score?
rules.faq6a: Yes — selected bets earn real points (Expert 5pt, Hard 3pt, Medium 2pt, Easy 1pt). The admin enters the correct answers after the phase ends and triggers a recompute. Points appear on the leaderboard automatically.

predictions.knockoutFormulaPts: Exact score = {exact} pts · Correct result = {result} pts · Upset +3 pts

predictions.trophyWarningSub: Your picks were saved. Fix your group standings or trophy picks to resolve this.
predictions.conflictEliminatedInGroup: {label}: {flag} {name} is predicted 4th in Group {group} — they will be eliminated in the group stage.
predictions.conflictNotInQualifiers: {label}: {flag} {name} is predicted 3rd in Group {group} but isn't in your 3rd-place qualifier picks — they may not advance.
predictions.conflictSameBracketHalf: {champFlag} {champName} and {ruFlag} {ruName} are on the same side of the 2026 bracket — they can meet at most in the semi-final, so they can't both be Champion and Runner-up.
predictions.scoredPicksSub: These earn real points — check the Rules page for the full breakdown.
predictions.funBetsSub: No points — just for fun and bragging rights.
predictions.noMatchesYet: No matches scheduled for this stage yet.
predictions.rebuyPageSub: 1 rebuy per user · Only available when your predicted champion is eliminated
predictions.rebuyAvailableSub: Your champion has been eliminated. Pick a new one.
predictions.rebuyNotUnlockedSub: Your original champion is still in the tournament, or the admin hasn't unlocked rebuys yet.
predictions.championStillIn: Your predicted champion is still in the tournament.
predictions.championStillInNamed: Your predicted champion ({champion}) is still in the tournament.
predictions.noPick: Submit your pre-tournament champion pick first.
predictions.rebuyAutoUnlocks: Your rebuy unlocks automatically when your predicted champion is eliminated.
predictions.lockIn: Lock In Rebuy — This Cannot Be Changed
predictions.receiptSub: Your complete prediction sheet — save or print before June 7.
predictions.autoZeroNote: Empty box set to 0 — saved as {home}:{away}

locks.confirmLockBody: Players will no longer be able to edit predictions for this stage.
locks.confirmUnlockBody: Players will be able to edit predictions for this stage again.
